member.name: T:Bonsai.Spinnaker.ColorProcessingAlgorithm
member.summary: Specifies the method used to convert bayer pattern encoded color images.

member.name: F:Bonsai.Spinnaker.ColorProcessingAlgorithm.Default
member.summary: Specifies that the default debayering algorithm should be used.

member.name: F:Bonsai.Spinnaker.ColorProcessingAlgorithm.NoColorProcessing
member.summary: Specifies that no debayering algorithm should be used and only the raw frame data is returned.

member.name: T:Bonsai.Spinnaker.SpinnakerCapture
member.summary: Represents an operator that generates a sequence of images acquired from the specified FLIR Spinnaker camera.

member.name: P:Bonsai.Spinnaker.SpinnakerCapture.Index
member.summary: Gets or sets the optional index of the camera from which to acquire images. If no serial number and no index is specified, the first detected camera will be used.

member.name: P:Bonsai.Spinnaker.SpinnakerCapture.SerialNumber
member.summary: Gets or sets the optional serial number of the camera from which to acquire images. If no serial number is specified, the index will be used for camera selection.

member.name: P:Bonsai.Spinnaker.SpinnakerCapture.ColorProcessing
member.summary: Gets or sets a value specifying the method used to process bayer pattern encoded color images.

member.name: M:Bonsai.Spinnaker.SpinnakerCapture.Configure(SpinnakerNET.IManagedCamera)
member.summary: Configures the acquisition mode on the selected camera.
member.exception: Unable to configure the camera acquisition mode.

member.name: M:Bonsai.Spinnaker.SpinnakerCapture.Generate
member.summary: Generates an observable sequence of images acquired from the specified FLIR Spinnaker camera.
member.returns: A sequence of objects representing each data frame acquired from the camera and the managed chunk data containing additional information about the image.

member.name: M:Bonsai.Spinnaker.SpinnakerCapture.Generate``1(System.IObservable{``0})
member.summary: Generates an observable sequence of images acquired from the specified FLIR Spinnaker camera, where the start of acquisition is controlled by the input sequence.
member.typeparam: The type of the elements in the sequence.
member.param: The sequence containing the notification used to start reading images from the Spinnaker camera.
member.returns: A sequence of objects representing each data frame acquired from the camera and the managed chunk data containing additional information about the image.

member.name: T:Bonsai.Spinnaker.SpinnakerDataFrame
member.summary: Represents a data object containing a decoded image frame and the managed chunk data which contains additional information about the image.

member.name: M:Bonsai.Spinnaker.SpinnakerDataFrame.#ctor(OpenCV.Net.IplImage,SpinnakerNET.ManagedChunkData)
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class with the specified image frame and managed chunk data.
member.param: The managed chunk data which contains additional information about the image.

member.name: P:Bonsai.Spinnaker.SpinnakerDataFrame.ChunkData
member.summary: Gets the managed chunk data which contains additional information about the image.
